dis_application_view.llm_summary: Jun Wang is a CN national applying for Skilled Worker permission sponsored by Veracity Group Limited for Mechanical engineers (SOC 2122). The application states salary £47,034 against the SOC going rate £46,800 and start date 2026-07-01. DIS routes the case to manual review because employment-letter salary does not match CoS. The officer should inspect the linked evidence and use the RFI flow where further evidence is needed.
